title: Anthropic & OpenAI: Agent evolution and market shifts — Apr 15
summary: Today's review covers major AI product updates from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, focusing on agent capabilities and creative tools. We also examine new enterprise deployments and the evolving economics of AI infrastructure, alongside key research into model behavior and efficiency.
